CustomField.description: Total Amount Due : This is the amount due generated by the system. This might get overridden by the user. Rent - Rent due + Intereset - MRO Aircraft MR - UR.Total_Maintenance_Reserve__c Assembly MR - AsmblyUR.Total_Maintenance_Reserve__c
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Amount of Invoice before taxes or any adjustments
CustomField.label: Original Invoiced Amount($)
